description: Fix dark mode: remove forcedTheme='light' from ThemeProvider, integrate theme toggle into desktop header, ensure all surfaces have proper dark mode styling, and fix ThemeColorSync to react to both route and theme changes.
steps: In apps/web/components/providers.tsx: Remove forcedTheme='light' prop from the ThemeProvider. Keep attribute='class', defaultTheme='light', enableSystem={false}.

In apps/web/components/theme-toggle.tsx: Update ThemeToggleIcon to have a 44x44px touch target (min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] or h-10 w-10 minimum), improve aria-label to be descriptive ('Switch to dark mode' / 'Switch to light mode' based on state), ensure the icon shows target state (Sun when dark = switch to light, Moon when light = switch to dark). Use bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-800 to match other header action buttons. Keep Framer Motion rotation animation but ensure it works well pre-mount with a placeholder. Fix unmounted state to not show any icon (avoid hydration mismatch).

In apps/web/components/header.tsx: Add ThemeToggleIcon to the desktop header's right actions area, between the LanguageSwitcher and the search button. Import ThemeToggleIcon from '@/components/theme-toggle'.
In apps/web/components/theme-color-sync.tsx: Ensure getThemeColor returns '#F7F7FA' (not '#FFFFFF') for default light mode per the design system. The dark default '#020617' is correct.

In apps/web/app/globals.css: Audit and fix dark mode surfaces. The floating-cart-bar dark style uses #0f172a which is fine. Verify .ios-glass dark variant uses the correct dark background. Add/fix dark mode for .sticky-category-rail (background should use dark bg). Ensure .dark body background gradient uses the correct values. Fix any pure-white references to off-white #F7F7FA in light mode where applicable.

In apps/web/components/product-grid.tsx: Ensure category pills have proper dark mode active state - currently they use 'bg-black text-white' which works in light but needs dark variant (use 'bg-white text-black dark:bg-white dark:text-black' for active, or keep primary approach). Ensure sort buttons in the mobile filter sheet have clear dark mode states.

In apps/web/components/product-card.tsx: Verify dark mode border - currently uses 'dark:bg-neutral-900' without a dark border. Add 'dark:border-neutral-800' to ensure card edges are visible in dark mode.

In apps/web/components/mobile-bottom-nav.tsx: The active indicator uses 'bg-black' - in dark mode this should be 'bg-white' with text switching to dark. Update the indicator to use 'bg-black dark:bg-white' and update the active text color to 'text-white dark:text-black'.
acceptance_criteria: ThemeProvider no longer has forcedTheme prop - theme can be toggled
ThemeToggleIcon appears in desktop header between language switcher and search
Clicking theme toggle switches between light and dark mode
Theme persists across page refreshes (next-themes localStorage)
ThemeColorSync updates meta theme-color when theme changes
No hydration mismatch warnings from theme toggle
Product cards, header, bottom nav, floating cart bar all render correctly in dark mode
Category pills show clear active/inactive states in both modes
Focus rings remain visible in both modes
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm 0 errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm tests pass
findings: Pre-existing test failure: test 64 (production env verification requires Upstash rate limiting configuration) fails on base state - unrelated to theme changes. All 63 other tests pass. Lint: 0 errors, 10 warnings (all pre-existing).
